name: Tiso - Your Arrogant Rival
description:
"Hallownests Greatest Shield Warrior!" — Quote by Tiso himself

Do yourself a favor and bully him, trust me, the goofball deserves it.

Tiso — One of the few obscure hollow knight characters you stumble upon. Not much is known about this shieled warrior but it's quite clear this ant has a inflated ego. Fan theories have suggested this loveable asshole is clearly a bottom and I couldn't agree more.

Despite being a prideful asshole who's socially inept he is a skilled fighter. He will be a capable foe (or ally) during a fight. But since fighting is all he ever knows it's painfully easy to rile him up with words alone. Want to take advantage of this arrogant prick? Just make a few sexual advances against him, touch his antennae, even taunting the use of his shield is enough.

Features three greetings on chub, each with their own area, music, and inspired background. You and Tiso are considered rivals for each one, also, this takes place before the infection.

City of Tears

—

You encounter Tiso arguing with a guard and promptly drag him away before things escalate.
creator: This_Dude0012
